content.p: Hello there! Changed the layout a lil some. Added proper credits to the 'links and resources' page, apologies if I had missed any. Embedded a terminal. You can find it under the 'sitenav' panel, or by pressing 'Ctrl+/' on your keyboard. Main page is responsive and mobile compatible now. Also added a 3D model showcase.

Happy new years! Remade the homepage from scratch. It now has horizontal figure rather than a vertical one which will be hell to make it mobile compatible. Also added; a notepad to store your sensitive information, RSS/Atom feed display to display the latest entry, buttons to other pages and a chatbox. Prolly will design the other pages as well but it takes too much effort so no promises.
